sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IShares China Large-Cap ETF Options Spot-On: On January 28th, 83,844 Contracts Were Traded, With 4.33 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 28th, the iShares China Large-Cap ETF (FXI.US) saw significant options trading, with a total volume of 83,844 contracts. Call options dominated, accounting for 77.74% of transactions, while put options made up 22.26%. The open interest for FXI reached approximately 4.33 million contracts, which is 106.84% of its 30-day average.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q4 CY2025
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 9.1% year on year to $5.17 billion, beating analyst estimates. The company also reported strong non-GAAP profit of $7.65 per share, exceeding consensus by 6.8%. Management raised its full-year Adjusted EPS guidance, indicating a positive outlook for the industrial machinery company.

feed.title: PulteGroup (PHM) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
feed.summary: PulteGroup (PHM) reported Q4 earnings of $2.88 per share, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.78, though lower than the prior year's $3.50 per share. The company also exceeded revenue expectations, posting $4.61 billion against a consensus of $4.31 billion. Despite outperforming the market year-to-date, the stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), suggesting it is expected to perform in line with the market.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Confirms Order of New Discovery Class; First Ship to Arrive in 2029
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has officially ordered a new "Discovery Class" of ships from French shipbuilder Chantiers de l’Atlantique, with the first vessel expected in 2029 and a second in 2032. This new class aims to introduce fresh design concepts and onboard experiences, building on previous innovations in the cruise industry. The agreement continues a long-standing partnership between Royal Caribbean and the shipbuilder, promising a new generation of ocean vacations.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips’ winter oil exploration plans can go ahead, federal judge rules
feed.summary: A federal judge in Alaska has ruled against environmental and tribal groups, allowing ConocoPhillips' winter oil exploration in the National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska to proceed. Judge Sharon Gleason denied a preliminary injunction request, stating the plaintiffs did not demonstrate a likelihood of success in their lawsuit. This decision comes despite a recent rig accident and amid ongoing legal challenges to oil development in the region.

feed.title: PSEG Recycled More Than 86% of Its Generated Materials
feed.summary: PSEG announced that it recycled more than 86% of the materials it generated in 2024, diverting waste from landfills and supporting local nonprofits. This effort is part of the company's commitment to sustainability and its "Powering Progress" vision. PSEG's thoughtful choices on job sites help power and support communities, earning them a spot on the Dow Jones Sustainability North America Index for 17 consecutive years.

feed.title: OVC Basketball on Gray Media
feed.summary: The Ohio Valley Conference (OVC) announced that select basketball games, in addition to airing on ESPN+, will also be simulcast on linear TV via Gray Media television stations. This includes a doubleheader featuring Little Rock and Tennessee State today, with specific stations listed for coverage across various cities. Gray Media, a large multimedia company, will provide access to these games for a wider audience within the OVC footprint.

feed.title: Enveric licenses RCANN trademark portfolio to TOTEC Pharma
feed.summary: Enveric Biosciences, through its subsidiary Akos Biosciences, has licensed its RCANN US trademark portfolio to TOTEC Pharma, Inc. This agreement, which includes an option for future purchase by TOTEC under certain conditions, aims to advance the commercialization of patented cannabinoid crème technology for radiation dermatitis. The deal could generate milestone payments and royalties for Enveric based on TOTEC's commercial success.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Completes Chronosphere Acquisition, Unifying Observability and Security for the AI Era
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has completed its acquisition of Chronosphere, an observability company, to unify observability and security for the AI era. This acquisition aims to address the challenge of securing massive data volumes in AI-driven operations by providing deep, real-time visibility into applications, infrastructure, and AI systems. The integration of Cortex® AgentiX™ with Chronosphere's platform will enable AI agents to automatically identify and fix security and IT issues, moving towards autonomous remediation.

feed.title: Is Take-Two Interactive the Last Pure-Play Gaming Stock?
feed.summary: With Ubisoft facing cancellations and Electronic Arts going private, Take-Two Interactive is becoming a key pure-play gaming stock in the U.S. markets. The company employs a three-pillar strategy focusing on prestige games like "Grand Theft Auto," reliable annual releases such as NBA 2K, and mobile gaming through Zynga. While the upcoming "Grand Theft Auto VI" release is a major catalyst, investors are closely watching Take-Two's fiscal Q3 2026 earnings for further guidance.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) Price Target Raised to $45.00
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) to $45.00 from $40.00, with other analysts also increasing their targets recently; however, the consensus rating remains "Hold" with an average price target of $42.63. The airline exceeded Q4 EPS expectations and saw revenue grow by 7.4%, leading management to raise its FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance, signaling anticipated profit growth. Despite positive long-term outlooks, near-term risks include Q1 2026 EPS guidance below street estimates and unusual put buying activity, which could create short-term stock pressure.

feed.title: KeyCorp Cuts ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) Price Target to $115.00
feed.summary: KeyCorp reduced its price target for ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) shares to $115.00 from $155.00, assigning an "underweight" rating and suggesting an 11.32% potential downside. Despite this, ServiceNow reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, alongside announcing a $5 billion share buyback and new AI partnerships. Analyst opinions are mixed, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus but some firms expressing caution regarding guidance and AI monetization.

feed.title: Progressive (PGR) Analyst Rating Update: BMO Capital Lowers Price Target
feed.summary: BMO Capital has updated its rating for Progressive (PGR), maintaining a "Market Perform" status but lowering the price target from $239 to $232. This adjustment reflects an ongoing reassessment by analysts of market conditions and company performance, resulting in a 2.93% decrease in the target. The average target price from 20 analysts is $245.90, implying a 15.59% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Reports Mixed Q4 Results Amid Pending Uni
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) reported mixed Q4 results with a 2% decline in revenue but an improved adjusted operating ratio. The company is focusing on productivity and safety amidst economic challenges. A potential merger with Union Pacific (UNP) is a significant upcoming event, offering NSC shareholders one UNP share plus cash for each NSC share upon regulatory approval.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) Schedules Investor Day Focusing on Aerospace and Automation in June
feed.summary: Honeywell (HON) is scheduled to host an investor day in June, focusing on its Aerospace and Automation segments, which are key contributors to its revenue. The company, with a market capitalization of $137.54 billion, demonstrates robust financial health with strong profitability and liquidity, despite issuing new debt. While valuation metrics suggest it trades at a premium, analyst sentiment remains positive, with institutional confidence evident in high ownership.

feed.title: Cogent Communications to Host Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Call on February 20, 2026
feed.summary: Cogent Communications Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCOI) announced it will host a conference call on February 20, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 operating results. A press release detailing the results will be issued at 7:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Interested parties can access the call via dial-in numbers or an audio webcast on Cogent's website.

feed.title: First Solar to reveal 2026 financial outlook in Feb. 24 webcast
feed.summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) will report its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results and provide its 2026 financial guidance and outlook on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, after market close. The company, a leading US-headquartered photovoltaic solar technology manufacturer, will host a conference call and live webcast to discuss these results. A replay of the webcast will be available through March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher and NVIDIA Partner to Expand AI Driven Laboratory Automation
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific and NVIDIA have announced a strategic collaboration to integrate advanced AI technologies into scientific instruments and laboratory workflows. This partnership aims to modernize laboratory operations, reduce manual tasks for scientists, and improve data management by leveraging NVIDIA's AI platform and models with Thermo Fisher's laboratory technologies. The initiative seeks to accelerate scientific discovery and facilitate breakthroughs in life sciences through more intuitive, efficient, and data-driven experimental processes, ushering in an era of "lab-in-the-loop science."

feed.title: DiNuzzo Private Wealth Adds 62,000 DFGP Shares
feed.summary: DiNuzzo Private Wealth has increased its holdings in the Dimensional Global Core Plus Fixed Income ETF (DFGP) by adding 62,255 shares, valued at an estimated $3.43 million. This purchase brings their total stake in DFGP to 2.57% of their $919.22 million assets under management. The ETF itself focuses on global diversification across debt securities and has a market capitalization of $2.13 billion with a 3.43% dividend yield.

feed.title: SAM Awarded Consulting Contract by Con Edison for CIM-Based Data Modeling and GIS Pilot
feed.summary: SAM, through its company Xtensible, has been awarded a consulting contract by Con Edison to conduct a pilot project. This project will demonstrate the value of Common Information Model (CIM)-based data modeling integrated with Geographic Information Systems (GIS) for utility grid modernization. The aim is to improve data quality, interoperability, and reuse for Con Edison's data and grid modernization initiatives.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Sells 108,068 Shares of eBay Inc. $EBAY
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in eBay Inc. by selling 108,068 shares, decreasing its holdings by 83.3% to 21,711 shares valued at $1,975,000. This comes as other institutional investors have adjusted their positions, and insider selling has also occurred among eBay executives. Wall Street analysts have provided mixed ratings for eBay, with an average "Hold" and a target price of $95.66.

feed.title: The Clorox Company $CLX Shares Purchased by Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC significantly increased its stake in The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) by 64.2% in Q3, now owning 25,732 shares valued at approximately $3.17 million. Despite this increase from institutional investors, sell-side analysts maintain a cautious "Reduce" rating with a consensus price target of $122.19. Clorox recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.24 per share, offering a 4.6% yield, with the ex-dividend date on January 28th and payment on February 13th.

feed.title: 14 Analysts Assess C.H. Robinson Worldwide: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Fourteen analysts have recently evaluated C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ: CHRW), resulting in an average 12-month price target of $182.0, a significant increase from the previous average. These assessments highlight the company's strong market capitalization, but also note a recent decline in revenue. Despite revenue challenges, C.H. Robinson Worldwide demonstrates strong profitability, effective asset management, and a prudent financial strategy with above-average net margin, ROE, and ROA, alongside a below-average debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: 22,252 Shares in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD Bought by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently bought 22,252 shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) for approximately $1.95 million. This purchase is part of broader institutional investment activity, with other firms also increasing their stakes in the company. Church & Dwight reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and has received varied ratings from Wall Street analysts, resulting in an average "Hold" rating and a price target of $98.85.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Has $2.25 Million Position in APA Corporation $APA
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its holdings in APA Corporation by 72.2% in the third quarter, decreasing its stake to 92,761 shares valued at $2.25 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their positions in APA. Wall Street analysts have a mixed outlook on APA, with an average "Hold" rating and a price target of $26.35, while the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Takes Position in Analog Devices, Inc. $ADI
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired a new stake of 8,248 shares in Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) valued at approximately $2.027 million. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with several other firms also increasing their holdings in the semiconductor company. Despite some insider selling, Analog Devices has shown strong price performance, revenue growth, and analyst upgrades, boasting a market capitalization of $155.20 billion.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Raises Stock Holdings in Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Omnicom Group Inc. by 156.0% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 27,680 shares valued at $2,257,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in OMC. Omnicom Group recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.80 per share, resulting in a 4.2% annual dividend yield, and the company has received varied ratings from Wall Street analysts, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $92.14.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Acquires 43,223 Shares of Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc $KDP
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC increased its stake in Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc. by 69.9% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 43,223 shares to own a total of 105,015 shares valued at $2.66 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, while a Keurig Dr Pepper VP recently sold 10,000 shares. Analysts currently have an average "Moderate Buy" rating for KDP with an average target price of $34.87.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Increases Stock Position in Hubbell Inc $HUBB
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Hubbell Inc (NYSE:HUBB) by 522.7% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 4,745 shares valued at $2.04 million. Other institutional investors like Boston Partners and Mirova US LLC also made substantial changes to their positions. The article also details recent insider transactions, Hubbell's stock performance, and current analyst ratings, which suggest a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: 12,979 Shares in Intercontinental Exchange Inc. $ICE Purchased by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired 12,979 shares of Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (ICE) valued at approximately $2.187 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their ICE holdings, with 89.30% of the stock owned by institutions. The article also provides details on ICE's financial performance, analyst ratings, and recent insider transactions.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Raises Stock Holdings in Enphase Energy, Inc. $ENPH
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) by 114.1% in the third quarter, now owning 56,349 shares valued at $1.994 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the semiconductor company. Enphase Energy recently reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and currently has a market capitalization of $5.30 billion.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Decreases Stock Position in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. $ZBH
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. by 46.9% in the third quarter, now owning 20,953 shares worth $2,064,000. Despite this, several other institutional investors, including Vanguard Group Inc. and Dodge & Cox, increased their positions in Zimmer Biomet during the second quarter. The medical equipment provider recently reported earnings that beat analyst estimates and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: West Side Tractor joins Trimble Technology Outlet network
feed.summary: Trimble has announced West Side Tractor Sales Co. as the newest Trimble Technology Outlet. This partnership allows West Side Tractor to sell Trimble's grade control, site positioning systems, and correction services directly to customers using John Deere earthmoving equipment in northern Illinois, Indiana, and parts of southwest Michigan. The collaboration aims to enhance jobsite productivity and profitability for users of various machine types by making Trimble technology more accessible.

feed.title: Evergy Schedules Conference Call to Discuss 4th Quarter Results
feed.summary: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) announced it will release its 2025 fourth quarter earnings on Thursday, February 19, 2026, before market open. The company will also host a conference call and audio webcast on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern (8:00 a.m. Central) to discuss the results. Supplemental financial information will be posted on the investors section of Evergy's website.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Takes Position in Five9, Inc. $FIVN
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd has acquired a new stake in Five9, Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVN) by purchasing 85,957 shares valued at approximately $2.08 million during the third quarter. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in Five9, which has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $32.07. Insider activity shows CEO Michael Burkland and insider Tiffany N. Meriweather selling shares, while the company announced a share repurchase program.

feed.title: Blake Shelton extends Vegas residency with 8 more 2026 shows
feed.summary: Blake Shelton has announced eight additional dates for his "Live in Las Vegas" residency at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, scheduled for May 6-24, 2026, due to overwhelming fan demand. Tickets for these new shows will go on public sale on February 6, 2026, with various presale opportunities starting February 2, 2026. Shelton's residency promises a powerful performance featuring his chart-topping hits and new music.

feed.title: Enova (ENVA) Stock Price Accelerated Following Acquisition Announcement
feed.summary: Enova International, Inc. (NYSE: ENVA) was a leading performance contributor for Blue Tower Asset Management's Global Value strategy in Q4 2025 and for the entire year, with its stock gaining 64% in 2025. The company's growth is attributed to organic expansion, continuous updates to its underwriting algorithms, and share buybacks. Despite its positive performance and robust business model, Blue Tower Asset Management suggests that some AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: Faruqi & Faruqi Encourages F5 Investors to Discuss Legal Options
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi LLP is investigating potential claims against F5, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025. The firm reminds investors that February 17, 2026, is the deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action, and encourages affected investors to contact partner Josh Wilson for legal advice. This investigation follows concerns over potential financial misconduct that could impact F5's reputation and stock performance.

feed.title: Donegal Group Inc. Announces Release Date for Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Donegal Group Inc. (NASDAQ:DGICA, NASDAQ:DGICB) announced plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, on Thursday, February 19, 2026, before market open. The company will also provide a supplemental investor presentation and a pre-recorded audio webcast with management commentary and a Q&A session on its website. Interested parties can submit questions for the Q&A session via email by February 12, 2026.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Buys 22,810 Shares of Akamai Technologies, Inc. $AKAM
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) by 476.0% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 22,810 shares. This brings their total holdings to 27,602 shares, valued at $2,091,000. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions, and insider activity shows recent stock sales by Akamai's COO and CFO.

feed.title: VIAVI Solutions Inc (NASDAQ:VIAV) Beats Q2 Earnings, Soars on Strong Q3 Revenue Guidance
feed.summary: VIAVI Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ:VIAV) reported strong fiscal second-quarter 2026 results, with earnings per share exceeding expectations despite revenue slightly missing the consensus. The market reacted positively, and the stock rose significantly after hours, driven by robust third-quarter revenue guidance that surpassed analyst estimates. This performance underscores management's confidence in the company's network testing and optical security segments.

feed.title: Clarivate (CLVT) Reveals New AI Academic Assistant, To Launch in Q3 2026
feed.summary: Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) has announced Clarivate Nexus, an AI-powered academic assistant designed to integrate library content and services with AI tools used by students and researchers. This new tool, part of Clarivate's expanding academic AI services, will be released for early access in Q3 2026, initially as a browser extension before direct integration into campus systems. The company also recently signed a multi-year agreement with Iran’s Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research.

feed.title: Dow to cut about 4,500 jobs as emphasis shifts to AI and automation
feed.summary: Dow is planning to cut approximately 4,500 jobs and anticipates $600 million to $800 million in severance costs as it shifts its emphasis to artificial intelligence and automation. This move is part of a broader plan to simplify operations and streamline the business. The job cuts follow similar actions by other major companies like Amazon, UPS, and Pinterest, reflecting a trend of increased AI adoption and economic uncertainty leading to workforce reductions.

feed.title: Analysts split on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) valuation despite strong operating momentum
feed.summary: This article discusses the split analyst opinions on Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) valuation. Despite strong operational performance, analysts are divided on whether its stock is a "buy" or "hold." This indicates a strong operational performance coupled with market uncertainty about its current valuation.

feed.title: Iqvia (IQV) Partners with Boehringer Ingelheim for Data Transfor
feed.summary: Iqvia (IQV) has announced a long-term strategic partnership with Boehringer Ingelheim to enhance the latter's global commercial data strategy using Iqvia's data-as-a-service technology. This collaboration aims to improve data harmonization and transformation across various therapeutic areas and regions for Boehringer Ingelheim. Despite strong financial performance characterized by revenue growth and expanding operating margins, Iqvia faces challenges such as high leverage, potential liquidity constraints, and its ROIC falling below WACC.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Raises Stake in Ecolab Inc. $ECL
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its holdings in Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) by 170.2% in the third quarter, bringing their total stake to 8,090 shares valued at $2,216,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Ecolab, which reported strong quarterly earnings aligning with analyst estimates. Ecolab recently raised its quarterly dividend and has an average "Moderate Buy" rating from Wall Street analysts.

feed.title: Boulder County residents can learn about recent power shutoff by Xcel Energy
feed.summary: Boulder County residents have the opportunity to learn more about the recent power shutoff implemented by Xcel Energy. This shutoff was a precautionary measure taken to prevent wildfires in the area.

feed.title: PSEG Recycled More Than 86% of Its Generated Materials
feed.summary: PSEG announced that it recycled over 86% of the materials it generated in 2024, diverting waste from landfills through initiatives like repurposing wetland mats and wooden pallets. This effort supports community partners such as America's Grow-a-Row. The company emphasizes a "Reduce. Reuse. Recycle. Reinvest" philosophy as part of its commitment to sustainability and community support.

feed.title: Altria Stock Drops After Earnings. It’s Losing the Smokeless Tobacco Race.
feed.summary: Altria Group stock fell on Thursday after the company, known for Marlboro cigarettes, reported lower-than-expected quarterly earnings and a decline in revenue. The article highlights that Altria is struggling in the smokeless tobacco market.

feed.title: AbbVie Launches Love in Mind to Spotlight the Emotional Impact of Migraine on Romantic Relationships
feed.summary: AbbVie has launched "Love in Mind," an educational initiative to highlight the emotional impact of migraine on romantic relationships. A Harris Poll survey conducted by AbbVie shows that migraine attacks significantly affect dating and intimacy, with nearly three out of four respondents stating migraine has impacted their romantic relationships. The campaign, supported by country music star Jessie James Decker, encourages open conversations with healthcare providers for comprehensive migraine care.
